arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudWatch log group.

creation_time.description: The time when the CloudWatch log group was created, in milliseconds since the epoch.

id.description: The unique identifier of the CloudWatch log group.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the logs in the log group.

log_group_class.description: The class type of the CloudWatch log group.

retention_in_days.description: The number of days to retain the log events in the specified log group.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the CloudWatch log group.
